description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly black finish and a robust, angular design. The body features a series of geometric cutouts and molded details, including venting holes along the lower fore-end and a series of diagonal grooves on the upper receiver. The rear section incorporates a pronounced pistol grip with a trigger guard and a short, angular stock or brace. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a prominent muzzle and reinforced housing. The overall construction suggests a tactical, urban-use firearm, with ergonomic features for easy handling and rapid deployment. The surface is glossy and hard, with a plastic or polymer-like sheen.
description: A compact, black, tactical shotgun with angular lines, venting holes, and a pistol grip, featuring a glossy, hard surface and futuristic detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and reinforced barrel housing, with minimal side details visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the vented fore-end, diagonal grooves, pistol grip, and angular stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the stock and grip, with the barrel and receiver mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the same venting, grip, and stock details, with additional mechanical features visible near the action.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with a reinforced muzzle and venting along the fore-end
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a solid, reinforced appearance
